# WB Digital Solutions

> Software studio founded by Walter Bruno Prado Vieira (Bruno Vieira), a senior full-stack and AI engineer with 25+ years of B2B business background. We design, build and ship complete digital products: websites with interactive 3D, bespoke systems, AI-powered platforms and automation, owned end to end from architecture to deployment. Clients in Brazil, Italy and the US. Content available in English, Portuguese (BR), Italian and Spanish.

Stack: TypeScript, React/Next.js, Node/NestJS, Python, Go, Rust, Three.js/WebGL, LangGraph/LangChain (RAG, AI agents), PostgreSQL, AWS, Docker, Terraform, Kubernetes.

## Services

- [Websites](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/websites): high-performance marketing sites, interactive 3D and motion design
- [Systems](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/systems): bespoke platforms, CRMs, e-commerce and internal tools
- [Automation](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/automation): workflow automation and integrations
- [AI](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/ai): AI agents, RAG pipelines and AI-powered product features

## Projects (case studies)

- [Revalida Italia](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/revalida-italia): complete online learning platform built from scratch; video lessons, mock exams, smart flashcards, 3D anatomy environments, live Zoom sessions, verifiable certificates; Next.js, NestJS, PostgreSQL, AWS
- [WB CRM](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/wb-crm): full sales CRM with kanban pipeline, cadences, email and AI-assisted workflows
- [AI Agents](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/ai-agents): multi-agent AI system orchestrated with LangGraph (router + specialized agents)
- [Vetor](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/vetor): desktop app (Tauri + Rust + React) for reviewing Brazilian income-tax returns
- [Finances](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/financas): personal finance and investments system in Go with market integrations
- [Stylos](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/stylos): complete online store with variants, cart and MercadoPago payments
- [Manon Ruivo](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/manon-ruivo): trilingual consultant platform with Sanity CMS blog
- [Flavia Guedes](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/flavia-guedes): brand site with gift-card e-commerce (Square, Stripe)
- [Kundalini Activation](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/kundalini-activation): conversion site with gallery, videos and events
- [Salto](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/salto): multilingual site with protected sales decks
- [Konnen](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/konnen): fitness assessment app with performance tests and PDF reports
- [Calendar](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/calendar): productivity app with recurring events, habits and goals
- [WB Project Manager](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/wb-project-manager): Linear/Jira-style project management tool
- [Salao Loha](https://www.wbdigitalsolutions.com/projects/salao-loha): marketing site for a beauty salon
